summary: Completed Phase 21A Quick Wins testing for KBS7 platform migration. Backend APIs fully functional (32/32 tests passed). Frontend testing revealed and fixed critical bug in CMS portfolios schema. All Phase 21A features verified working: DemoAnalyticsPage fix, MediaLibrary dialog improvements, and CMS side-by-side preview (ResourceManager dialog width).

fixed_bugs.issue: portfolios, case-studies, and products schemas were defined inside SETTINGS_SCHEMA instead of RESOURCE_SCHEMAS, causing 'Unknown resource: portfolios' error
fixed_bugs.fix: Moved portfolios, case-studies, and products definitions from SETTINGS_SCHEMA (after line 233) back into RESOURCE_SCHEMAS (before closing brace). Removed duplicate definitions.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/leads - Leads list working (0 leads)
Backend: GET /api/admin/demo-analytics/overview - Demo analytics working (0 requests)
Backend: GET /api/admin/demo-analytics/requests - Recent requests working (0 items)
Backend: GET /api/admin/media - Media library working (0 assets)
Backend: GET /api/admin/media/folders - Folders list working (0 folders)
Backend: GET /api/admin/cms/portfolios - Portfolios endpoint working (0 items)
Backend: GET /api/admin/users - Admin users list working (3 users)
Frontend: Homepage loads with immersive space-themed design (constellation canvas, live telemetry widget)
Frontend: Login page renders correctly with email and password fields
Frontend: Demo Analytics Page loads without crash, shows empty state correctly (Phase 21A.1 fix verified)
Frontend: Media Library 'Folder Baru' button opens Shadcn Dialog (not window.prompt) (Phase 21A.2 fix verified)
Frontend: Media Library dialog has folder name input field
Frontend: CMS Portfolio Manager page loads correctly after schema fix
Frontend: CMS Portfolio Manager shows 'Tambah' (Add) button
Frontend: CMS Portfolio Manager has Export and Import buttons

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all Phase 21A features verified working after bug fix)

findings: DemoAnalyticsPage loads without crash at /portal/admin/demo-analytics
Page shows empty state correctly with 0 values for all metrics
No runtime errors or 'Cannot read properties of undefined' errors
Metrics displayed: Total Requests (0), Last 30 Days (0), Active Sessions (0), Completion Rate (0%)
Empty states shown: 'Belum ada data permintaan demo' and 'Belum ada permintaan demo terbaru'
Backend endpoints working: GET /api/admin/demo-analytics/overview and GET /api/admin/demo-analytics/requests
Media Library page loads at /portal/admin/media
'Folder Baru' (New Folder) button found with data-testid='media-new-folder-button'
Clicking button opens Shadcn Dialog (not native window.prompt)
Dialog has data-testid='media-new-folder-dialog'
Dialog contains folder name input field with data-testid='media-new-folder-input'
Dialog has Cancel and Create buttons
Dialog closes properly when Cancel is clicked
No native window.prompt or window.confirm used (replaced with AlertDialog for delete)
ResourceManager dialog width increased from max-w-3xl to max-w-6xl
CMS Portfolio Manager page loads correctly at /portal/admin/cms/portfolios
Page shows 'Portfolio' heading and empty state
'Tambah' (Add) button present for creating new portfolio items
Export and Import buttons present
ResourceForm.jsx has side-by-side preview on desktop (≥lg breakpoint)
Mobile view (<lg) uses tab toggle between Edit and Preview
Desktop view shows Edit form on left (60%) and Preview on right (40%) with sticky positioning
CRITICAL BUG FIXED: portfolios/case-studies/products schemas were incorrectly placed in SETTINGS_SCHEMA instead of RESOURCE_SCHEMAS
